assertionResults.reason: Login page loaded at /login with email input and submit button visible; no error banner on initial load.
evidence: DOM snapshot showed textbox 'Email address' and button 'Send Magic Link'
Console/errors check: none on initial load

assertionResults.reason: Supabase OTP endpoint returned over_email_send_rate_limit (HTTP 429) for valid email submissions, so the confirmation state could not be reached for known/unknown email comparison.
evidence: UI showed 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' after submit
Browser console captured failed resource with status 429

assertionResults.reason: Navigating to a fresh valid Admin-generated magic link (redirect_to=/auth/callback) did not land on /dashboard; app ended on /login?error=auth_callback_error with URL hash tokens and no sb auth cookies.
evidence: Cookie inspection after link navigation showed no sb-*-auth-token cookies

assertionResults.reason: Could not establish an authenticated browser session because magic-link callback flow did not produce a valid dashboard session.
Session persistence on refresh is not testable without a successful authenticated session.
Sign-out flow is not testable without reaching an authenticated dashboard state with sign-out control available.
Post-logout dashboard access check depends on a successful logout sequence from an authenticated session, which could not be established.
Dashboard sidebar link verification requires authenticated access to /dashboard routes; auth precondition failed.

frictions.description: Login form submissions repeatedly returned backend 429 rate-limit responses instead of reaching confirmation state.
frictions.resolution: Retried with cooldown and alternate email namespace; still rate-limited.

frictions.description: Admin-generated magic link navigated to /login?error=auth_callback_error with hash tokens, not /dashboard.
frictions.resolution: Validated with fresh links generated immediately before navigation; behavior persisted.

blockers.description: Supabase email send rate limit (over_email_send_rate_limit) prevented successful OTP submission in browser flow.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried after cooldown and with alternate unique email; still 429.

blockers.description: Could not obtain authenticated dashboard session from valid Admin-generated magic link callback flow.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Generated fresh single-use links with redirect_to=/auth/callback and retried navigation; still redirected to login error state.

summary: Tested 8 assigned assertions: 1 passed (VAL-AUTH-001), 1 failed (VAL-AUTH-003), and 6 blocked due auth flow prerequisites not satisfiable in this run.
